user.title: Connect to LLM Backend
user.description: Choose the API type and enter connection details.

model.title: Select Ollama Model
model.description: Choose which Ollama model to use for conversations.

openai_model.title: Configure OpenAI-Compatible Model
openai_model.description: Enter the model name and API key for your OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g., LiteLLM).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the server. Ensure it is running and accessible.
error.no_models: No models found on the Ollama server. Pull a model first (e.g., `ollama pull llama3.1`).

data.try_ha_first: Try Home Assistant intents first (device control)
